NEGATIVE.body:
Dear {sender_name},

Thank you for reaching out. We sincerely apologise for the inconvenience you've experienced regarding "{subject}".

Your concern has been flagged as high-priority and a member of our team will follow up with you within 24 hours with a resolution.

We value your feedback and are committed to making this right.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team

POSITIVE.body:
Dear {sender_name},

Thank you so much for your kind words regarding "{subject}"! We truly appreciate your positive feedback.

It's great to know that our efforts are making a difference. We'll share your message with the team — it means a lot to us.

If there's anything else we can help with, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Warm regards,
Customer Success Team

COMPLIANCE.body:
Dear {sender_name},

We have received your email regarding "{subject}" and recognise that it raises a compliance-related concern.

This matter has been escalated to our Compliance & Legal team for immediate review. You can expect a formal acknowledgement within 48 business hours.

In the meantime, please refrain from sharing additional sensitive information over email. A secure channel will be provided if needed.

Thank you for bringing this to our attention.

Regards,
Compliance Office
